calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:58 am and concluding at 10:05 am.

Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center L.P. is present represented by John Byrne, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Dulamhav Urjinkhand not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

DARREN IVERSON is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center L.P. and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center L.P., and against Defendants Dulamhav Urjinkhand an individual DBA "Gangnam BBQ" and Whar Han Ng an individual DBA "Gangnam BBQ", as follows:

1. Damages: $102,819.22
2. Holdover Damages: $56,787.00
3. Prejudgment Interest: $0
4. Costs: $732.60
5. Attorney fees: $2,825.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $163,164.32

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
